offer: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of invoices.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking advice
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to freelancers with a demo video
Join community forums for freelancers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try invoice alerts and payment tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing clients
